description: The disaster management cell of the State government has claimed that it is the first such initiative in Maharashtra

title: Israeli troops push deeper into Lebanon as two sides start military talks at Pentagon
description: In Washington, a six-member Lebanese military delegation met with Israeli military officials in the first direct military talks between the two countries in decades

title: New UFO files offer no answers – but something is happening in the skies
description: The U.S. government has released a new batch of documents detailing various cases of “Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena” (UAPs), commonly known as UFOs, including photos and videos of unexplained aerial events.

title: Spurious liquor kills 15 in Pune, Pimpri-Chinchwad; 8 held, probe ordered
description: Maharashtra CM orders police commissioners to conduct a joint probe; raids conducted at multiple liquor shops overnight; Opposition leaders allege failure in law enforcement, accuse police of a cover-up

title: Cancel bail to female teacher in Janakpuri school rape case: Delhi Police urges HC
description: The teacher was arrested for allegedly concealing the incident from the authorities and was remanded to one day’s police custody by the trial court on May 14

title: Portion of platform shed collapses at Lucknow station, three injured
description: Sources said renovation and concourse construction work was underway at the station and portions of the platform number five shed had already been dismantled. The collapsed section was also slated for removal

title: Worth examining Vijay’s appeal to children to convince adults to vote for him, says judge citing personal anecdote
description: He opines that a case filed against TVK for making an appeal to children during elections is worth being looked into

title: Is Indus Waters Treaty deadlock hurting Pakistan? Karachi reels under chronic water shortage
description: Karachi faces a severe water crisis during peak summer, coinciding with Eid-ul-Adha. Jamaat-e-Islami Pakistan chief Hafiz Naeem ur Rehman has accused the ruling PPP of gross mismanagement and failure to address the city's chronic water shortages despite 18 years in power.  Nearly 70% of the city is reportedly experiencing extended supply disruptions, forcing residents to buy expensive private tankers.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi breaks down in dugout after Rajasthan Royals' IPL 2026 exit
description: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's IPL 2026 dream ended in tears despite his stellar 96, as Gujarat Titans advanced to the final.  The young Rajasthan Royals star, who amassed 776 runs this season, was visibly heartbroken after his team's elimination.  Captain Riyan Parag lauded his exceptional talent and maturity, predicting a bright future for the prodigious cricketer.

title: Microsoft CEO's Copilot ‘confusion fix’ that left employees laughing in townhall
description: Microsoft is reportedly developing a 'super app' to consolidate its confusing array of Copilot AI tools. This unified platform aims to end customer frustration by offering a single destination for various AI assistants, including coding, chat, and collaboration features. The app, expected by summer's end, will allow seamless switching between personal and work accounts, simplifying Microsoft's AI ecosystem.

title: AAP wins most wards in Punjab local polls, Opposition alleges misuse of govt. machinery
description: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann says AAP’s victory in the municipal elections is a decisive endorsement of his government’s development-driven governance model

title: Murder convict who jumped parole, worked in bollywood arrested
After nine cattle kills, Explorer to be tranquilised
Does Ranji Trophy count? Examining the logic of picking Gurnoor Brar over Auqib Nabi
description: There is more to selection than plain numbers. With fast bowlers, possessing attributes that supplement the prevailing pace attack is a serious consideration. India hasn’t had a genuinely tall quick who can unsettle batters with variable bounce since Ishant Sharma’s exit — this seems to have worked in the 6’5” Gurnoor’s favour, but Nabi may still have the selectors’ eye

title: Paint unit gutted in Vazhakulam
Man gets four life terms in POCSO case
Kerala’s Pariyathukavu residents hope government intervention will put an end to eviction threat
description: Pariyathukavu, a settlement in Ernakulam district, occupied by seven Dalit families for decades, has become the epicentre of a socio-political controversy with attempts to evict the residents, who have been engaged in a prolonged legal battle to protect their homes. G. Ragesh visits the area to gauge the gravity of the situation as both the residents and the claimants of the land await anxiously for finality

title: Sharp curves, unfinished roadwork identified as factors behind 320 crashes and 251 deaths at Cyberabad’s 43 black spots
description: Over 90% of the identified accident-prone stretches fall under the Medchal zone; NH-65 stretch emerged as the deadliest corridor with over 50% black spots.

title: Over 18,400 Gurukul seats filled in phase-I admissions in Telangana
Hectic parleys in Delhi over Ministry formation; CLP to meet today

title: World Environment Day 2026: Real estate adapts to climate change
description: From rising temperatures and flooding concerns, industry experts discuss how climate change is reshaping planning and long-term priorities across India’s property sector

title: Gulf's other war: UAE carried out strikes on Iran despite ceasefire — Report
description: The UAE's involvement in the Middle East conflict was deeper than previously known, with coordinated strikes on Iran, including energy facilities, even after an April ceasefire. These actions exposed divisions within the Gulf, as Saudi Arabia expressed concerns about escalating risks to regional energy supplies and global markets.

title: Kapil Dev interview: On Vaibhav Sooryavanshi and India’s obsession with cricket
description: Why the 1983 World Cup-winning captain Kapil Dev believes that India should look beyond cricket

title: U.S. says it struck vessel in eastern Pacific, killing three men
description: President Donald Trump’s administration has touted ‌its success at ​taking out suspected drug ⁠trafficking vessels in the eastern ‌Pacific and the Caribbean

title: Tamannaah Bhatia's old temple video sparks attention
description: Actress Tamannaah Bhatia's recent temple visit in Mumbai has gone viral, showcasing her spiritual side. Previously, she shared how Isha Yoga Centre practices, particularly meditation, have profoundly impacted her life, leading to increased joy and purpose. Tamannaah emphasizes spirituality's role in achieving happiness independent of external circumstances, encouraging others to explore its benefits.

title: Over 90% of Indian babies born in hospitals, 87% of one-year-olds fully vaccinated: NFHS-6
description: Survey conducted in 2023-2024 found reduced stunting, severe wasting among young children, improvements in services and nutrition for pregnant women, progress towards universal vaccination

title: Breadcrumbed and burnt out: Inside India’s situationship era
description: From podcasts and therapy-speak to breadcrumbing and attachment styles, modern dating has become saturated with emotional vocabulary. So why are situationships still thriving?

title: I would like an Indian chess championship with big money and all the top players: Aravindh Chithambaram
description: The 26-year-old has overcome a period of stagnation to show why some experts think he is one of India’s finest chess talents ever. In this interview, he talks about his astonishing arrival among the elites at 14, his Esports experience, Gukesh and Vaishali’s chances in their World title matches, and his dream National tournament

title: U.S. Judge orders removal of Trump’s name from Kennedy Center; blocks closure
description: U.S. District Judge Christopher Cooper ruled that the board “overstepped its statutory bounds” by unilaterally adding Mr. Trump’s name, stating that “only Congress can change the Kennedy Center’s name”

title: 'Maligning isn't constructive criticism': HC on Madhu Kishwar's bail plea
Mumbai Indians concerned about numerous dressing room 'leaks'
description: Mumbai Indians faced a dismal IPL 2026, plagued by persistent dressing room unrest and damaging leaks of sensitive information. This internal turmoil, escalating since Hardik Pandya's captaincy, has frustrated franchise figures and insiders alike. Management is now prioritising an immediate crackdown on these breaches to restore the team's former glory.

title: How Mohit Rai styled Aishwarya Rai Bachchan for Cannes 2026
description: At Cannes this year, Aishwarya Rai made heads turn in an electric blue Amit Aggarwal gown, and followed it up with blush pinks and feather boas. Celebrity stylist and designer Mohit Rai takes us behind the scenes

title: Supreme Court issues guidelines for protecting survivors of human trafficking
description: The petition highlighting the lack of laws and protective mechanisms for young girls trafficked into prostitution was filed by the non-governmental organisation (NGO) Prajwala in 2004

title: Shubman on his haunches, Shastri asks 'Where's the fevicol?' after Sudharsan's bizarre wicket
description: Gujarat Titans batter Sai Sudharsan experienced a rare hit-wicket dismissal twice in consecutive IPL matches.  This unusual event occurred during Qualifier 2 against Rajasthan Royals.  Despite this setback, Gujarat Titans secured a seven-wicket victory.  Skipper Shubman Gill expressed surprise at the repeated dismissal.  Gujarat Titans will now face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the final.

title: U.S. Democrats say Pam Bondi refuses to answer Trump questions in Epstein probe
description: Ms. Bondi faced sharp criticism from ​Democrats and some Republicans during her tenure for ‌her handling of the release of millions of documents related to late sex offender Epstein

title: Respect past agreements, initiate dialogue in Kashmir: RJD parliamentarian Sudhakar Singh
description: “Unfortunately, those who talk about human rights and democratic rights are being jailed,” Sudhakar Singh, referring to the incarceration of MP Rashid, said

title: Senior IPS officer Mahesh Kumar Aggarwal appointed Head of the Tamil Nadu Police
description: The 1994-Batch officer is serving as the DGP in the Border Security Force, Delhi. He replaces DGP/HoPF Sandeep Rai  Rathore. He was in the panel of three IPS officers recommended by the Union Public Service Commission as fit for appointment to the top post

title: IPL 2026 Qualifier 2: Gill masterclass guides Titans past Royals into final
description: The skipper puts on 167 with Sai Sudharsan to make short work of the 215-run target; Sooryavanshi's gem goes in vain as the Gujarat side makes it to the summit clash for the third time in five seasons

title: Morning Digest: Trump ponders whether to move forward with Iran deal; India-U.S. trade deal expected to be signed soon, says Sergio Gor, and more
description: Here is a select list of stories to start the day.

title: West Bengal government faces Annapurna challenge, to verify beneficiaries before rolling out cash transfer scheme
description: The financial burden which Annapurna Bhandar would have on the State exchequer is what is prompting the West Bengal government to verify the existing beneficiaries of Lakshmir Bhandar and drag its feet on the implementation of the scheme

title: Responsibility has to be fixed for paper leak: SC on NEET
description: 'NTA Must Learn From UPSC About Holding Exams'

title: The Rs 7 cr bargain vs the Rs 25 cr gamble: How Holder outshone IPL 2026's biggest buys
description: IPL auctions are often won on perception in December, but the real story usually emerges months later. While franchises splashed massive sums on Cameron Green, Matheesha Pathirana and Liam Livingstone, the smartest buys of IPL 2026 quietly came from the Rs 7-9 crore bracket. Jason Holder topped the charts by a distance, Josh Inglis maximised limited opportunities, and Ravi Bishnoi delivered steady returns. Meanwhile, several marquee signings struggled with injuries, poor form and role mismatches, turning auction-night hype into underwhelming seasons.

title: Iran-Israel war Updates: Trump will only accept Iran deal that 'satisfies his red lines', says White House official
description: Trump meets with aides to determine whether to move forward with Iran deal; The deal would extend the fragile ceasefire by 60 days as new talks are held on Iran’s disputed nuclear programme

title: 'More than ready': Sangakkara backs Vaibhav Sooryavanshi for India call-up after dream IPL
description: Kumar Sangakkara believes 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is ready for international cricket after a remarkable IPL campaign. The Rajasthan Royals opener amassed 776 runs in 16 innings at a blistering strike rate of 237.30, including one century and five fifties. The teenager could have had back-to-back centuries in the playoffs, but fell short on 97 and 96, respectively.

title: Is iShowSpeed making a FIFA World Cup 2026 song? Fans react to leak
description: Behind-the-scenes footage has sparked speculation that IShowSpeed may be working on a FIFA World Cup 2026 song. Videos from a large-scale shoot in Miami showed the streamer surrounded by production crews, drones, flags, and football-themed visuals. Fans linked the project to the upcoming tournament, especially after Speed hinted at World Cup plans during a recent tour. The rumors have gained traction because his 2022 World Cup anthem became a viral hit, amassing more than 208 million views on YouTube.

title: AAP wins big in Punjab civic elections ahead of 2027 assembly polls
description: Punjab's ruling AAP secured a significant victory in municipal polls, winning 5 out of 8 municipal corporations and over 950 wards. This win, with assembly elections approaching, is attributed by CM Bhagwant Mann to the government's welfare schemes. Congress and SAD trailed significantly, while independents emerged as a notable force.

title: 'Drishyam 3' BO day 9: Mohanlal's film slows at Rs 4.30 cr
description: Mohanlal's 'Drishyam 3' has achieved a remarkable Rs 200 crore worldwide, driven by strong overseas performance. While domestic collections remain solid at Rs 86.25 crore net, a noticeable dip in footfalls was observed on Day 9. Occupancy trends indicate a mid-week slowdown, though Kerala continues to be the film's strongest market.

title: 89 additional CAPF units, advanced surveillance, real-time monitoring for safe Amarnath yatra this year
description: Police officials said J&K Director General of Police Nalin Prabhat directed the district heads “to ensure proper arrangements for incoming units and their efficient ground deployment”

title: Shubman Gill scripts IPL history, becomes first batter to...
description: Shubman Gill delivered a captain's knock with a blistering 104 off 53 balls, becoming the fastest centurion in IPL playoff history. He also became the first captain to score a playoff century and the first to achieve multiple playoff hundreds. Gill, alongside Sai Sudharsan, forged a record-breaking 160-run partnership, propelling Gujarat Titans to victory.

title: GSTA requests govt to withdraw notices to teachers for fall in class 12 pass percentage
West Bengal CM meets Darjeeling hill leaders, acts tough on GTA corruption
description: Chief Minister Suvendu Adhikari said that the West Bengal government will seek benefits Pradhan Mantri Cha Shramik Protsahan Yojana (PMCSPY) which the previous government did not subscribe to.

title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce face new wedding strain amid growing concerns
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are reportedly facing significant challenges keeping their wedding plans private as leaks continue to emerge. Reports claim the couple has changed venues and dates, with Swift feeling increasingly vulnerable over trust concerns. Strict guest policies and heightened security measures have also drawn attention. Sources say the wedding is being managed with extraordinary precautions due to privacy and safety concerns, making preparations far more complicated than expected.

title: ‘Out of form and fitness a concern’: Manjrekar blasts Rohit Sharma's ODI selection
description: Sanjay Manjrekar has questioned the BCCI selectors' decision to include Rohit Sharma in the ODI squad over in-form youngsters Yashasvi Jaiswal and Sai Sudharsan. He believes the selectors are failing to prioritize Indian cricket's future, arguing that Jaiswal and Sudharsan have earned their spots with strong performances, while Rohit's form and fitness are questionable.

title: Ensure proper supply of seeds, fertilisers: AIKKMS
description: Members of All India Kisan Khet Majdoor Sangathan stage a demonstration in Dharwad

title: Trump will accept only Iran deal that meets his red lines: White House
description: President Trump has yet to approve a proposed deal with Iran, emphasizing that any agreement must meet his conditions, including preventing Iran from acquiring nuclear weapons. While discussions continue, Iran denies negotiating under US dictates. The uncertainty impacts energy markets, with regional tensions also escalating between Iran, the US, and Israel-Hezbollah.

title: Top US commander meets Cuban military officials amid rising tensions
description: A top US military commander met Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay, a rare high-level engagement amid escalating US pressure on Cuba. The meeting occurred as the Trump administration intensified sanctions and rhetoric, despite ongoing, albeit limited, diplomatic contacts. A new contingent of US sailors and Marines is also deploying to the Caribbean.

title: 66% of births in 2024 were first-borns; birth spacing for majority now 36 months
description: Kerala tops, Flap OPP

title: HCs must pronounce judgment within 3 months of reserving verdict: SC
Teen star Pooja Singh smashes high jump senior national record during Asian U20 Championships
description: Pooja setting a new national record was not a surprise as she is also the current Asian champion. Sh.e won the women's high gold at the Asian Championships in South Korea last year with a 1.89m effort

title: Rodrigues, Yastika and debutant Nandani power India to 38-run win over England
description: Yastika and Rodrigues counter-attacked brilliantly, stitching together a 126-run stand for the third wicket off just 76 balls to turn the innings around

title: Taylor Swift fans reignite Joe Alwyn Debate Amid Travis Kelce Romance buzz
description: A viral social media post claiming that Taylor Swift’s best work came during her relationship with Joe Alwyn has reignited debate among fans. Supporters point to acclaimed albums like Folklore and Evermore, while others argue Swift’s success is the result of her own artistic evolution. The discussion comes as Swift’s relationship with Travis Kelce remains under intense public scrutiny, with ongoing wedding rumors continuing to fuel fan interest and speculation.

title: Will focus on completing Delhi BJP restructuring: Harsh Malhotra
description: Harsh Malhotra said that teams in the districts will be formed in the next 15-20 days, and appointment of office bearers and frontal organisations will be completed in the next two months.

title: Uttar Pradesh emphasised to prevent water-borne diseases in rural areas through community driven participation
description: Mr. Shekhar, a 2004 batch Indian Administrative Service (IAS) officer, added that the women associated with Field Testing work are being paid honorarium according to the prescribed rates for the testing work carried out by them

title: CBI chief vows logical end to NEET probe, NTA says computer-based test will curb leaks
60% chance of deficient monsoon as IMD downgrades rain forecast
description: Rainfall Pegged At 90% Amid El Nino Shadow

title: Free DTC bus travel for NEET candidates on June 21
Inside China’s green transition
description: Ningbo, in southern Zhejiang Province of China, was once a historic maritime hub shaped by Buddhist culture and trade. It has now emerged as a key hub for showcasing China’s green industrial push, where electric vehicles, advanced manufacturing, and tightly integrated supply chains are powering the country’s bid for global leadership in the technologies of the future. Ananth Krishnan reports from the port city

title: Only 1% work left on India-US trade deal: US ambassador Sergio Gor
CBI charges 16 in Reliance ADAG case, names 5 senior executives
Blake Lively stays silent as Taylor Swift-Travis Kelce wedding nears
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce seem to be trying their best to keep things private as they gear up to get married in New York City amid the pop star’s strained bond with Blake Lively, just weeks before tying the knot. While the billionaire artist has maintained silence and has remained publicly distant from her former best friend, Blake Lively, it seems the actress is focused on improving her image.

title: Canada in technical recession ‘talk’ divides analysts; KPMG note says: It’s not good
description: Canada's economy unexpectedly contracted by 0.1% in the first quarter, marking two consecutive quarters of decline and sparking debate over a technical recession. Prolonged U.S. tariff uncertainty and geopolitical headwinds have impacted business investment and driven up domestic prices, though some economists dispute the recession label due to a lack of widespread weakness.

title: Shangri-La Dialogue: India's defence secretary reaffirms military coop with US
Rampur court set aside SP leader Abdullah Azam prison sentence in dual passport case
description: In its ruling dated December 5, 2025, the magistrate court had sentenced Khan to seven years in prison and imposed a fine of ₹50,000

title: Congress holds talks with Hemant Soren on fielding party nominee from one of 2 Rajya Sabha seats going to polls in Jharkhand
description: One seat became vacant following the death of former Jharkhand Mukti Morcha president and former CM Shibu Soren last year, while the second will fall vacant on June 21 when the term of BJP leader Deepak Prakash ends

title: Browns, Raiders linked to blockbuster trade for 49ers’ $120 million NFL Star
description: The San Francisco 49ers’ star player, Brandon Aiyuk, has been experiencing a pretty challenging time in the last few years as he was placed on PUP in the last season after sustaining brutal injuries in Week 7 in 2024 sparking major concer in the team. Though the team seems focused on trading him and the Washington Commanders have been strongly linked to Brandon Aiyuk, nothing has been confirmed yet. Amid this, the Las Vegas Raiders and the Cleveland Browns have emerged as strong landing spots for him.

title: Karnataka: CLP to elect DK Shivakumar leader today, paving way for CM post
description: DK Shivakumar is set to be formally elected as the new leader of the Congress Legislature Party in Bengaluru, succeeding Chief Minister Siddaramaiah. AICC leaders will attend the meeting where Shivakumar will be elected, followed by his submission of the CLP resolution to the governor to stake his claim in forming the new cabinet.

title: Karnataka : Fresh power tussle over deputy CM posts, cabinet berths & KPCC chief
Doctors express concern over rising childhood myopia
description: These concerns were raised during the launch of a ‘Myopia Clinic’ at Rajan Eye Care Hospital on Friday

title: PM’s silence on CBSE OSM controversy shows he cares more about his govt’s survival than students’ future: Rahul Gandhi
description: Opposition leader questions how TCS lost CBSE contract to COEMPT, which had a poor past track record.

title: Rise in women misusing law to get lucrative settlements: SC
description: 'Overwhelming Number Of False Cases Overshadowing Genuine Ones'

title: Supreme Court sets aside 'fraud' findings, disgorgement of ₹447 crore in 2007 RPL Futures Trading case
description: The court said there was no evidence that Reliance had any fraudulent intent or was attempting to corner the market merely because it held 40.10% open interest

title: Supreme Court sets 3-month deadline for High Courts to pronounce judgments after reserving orders
description: The Bench held that the bail orders must be ideally pronounced the next day, and communicated to the jail the same day

title: Delhi High Court upholds TRAI regulations capping television ads to 12 minutes per hour
description: Court says broadcasters cannot claim an ‘unfettered right to exploit spectrum for commercial purposes’, adding that ‘excessive or uneven commercial intrusion is a direct impairment of the right of consumers to a fair and reasonable viewing experience’

title: Karnataka has given the Congress a template to settle leadership feuds
description: Congress leaders Mallikarjun Kharge and Rahul Gandhi’s success in persuading Siddaramaiah to step down may now provide the party a template to handle similar leadership disputes

title: Naga body threatens to boycott Manipur government
description: The All Naga Students’ Association, Manipur also sets a similar timeline for the abrogation of ceasefire deals with Kuki extremist groups

title: International law, ‘optional’ for powerful states
description: Imperfect though it may be, the rules-based order remains humanity’s strongest defence against chaos

title: ‘Off with their heads’ – the purge of Republican dissenters
description: The Trumpian purge of Republican dissenters, along with growing inner-party feuds, has consequences for America and India alike

title: US Judge orders removal of Trump's name from Kennedy Center; president fumes
description: A US federal judge has ordered the Trump administration to remove President Trump's name from the Kennedy Center. The court ruled that renaming the Washington institution, a memorial to John F. Kennedy, requires congressional approval. The judge mandated the removal of all Trump signage and references within two weeks, following a board decision that faced significant backlash.

title: ‘Students are struggling’: California University professors press for return of standardised exams
description: University of California faculty are urging the reinstatement of SAT/ACT math requirements for STEM applicants, citing a significant decline in student math skills since the tests were dropped. They argue current admissions practices fail to ensure readiness, forcing instructors to reteach basic math and jeopardizing the quality of STEM education.

title: Major shock! After Sinner, Djokovic knocked out of French Open 2026
description: French Open 2026 witnessed two huge upsets as Novak Djokovic and Jannik Sinner crashed out of the tournament. Teenager Joao Fonseca stunned Djokovic in a five-set thriller after coming back from two sets down. Earlier, World No. 1 Sinner collapsed physically in extreme Paris heat and lost to Juan Manuel Cerundolo, ending his 30-match winning streak and opening up the men’s draw.

title: Sikh man’s murder conviction in UK triggers storm over carrying kirpan in public
description: A British Sikh man was convicted of murder using a kirpan, sparking calls to ban the ceremonial dagger in public. Accusations of two-tier policing arose after officers handcuffed the dying victim, believing a false claim of racial abuse. The victim's mother was convicted of aiding the killer. Investigations into police conduct are underway.

title: 'Poison gas, wear mask, no water': Man dies by suicide, leaves poignant note behind
description: A 42-year-old man, struggling with unemployment and financial distress, allegedly died by suicide in Gandhinagar. He left a note warning his family about poisonous substances in the house, showing concern for his daughter's safety. Police suspect the death occurred around May 22, with toxic pesticide packets recovered from the scene.

title: Gujarat-origin man pleads guilty in $9.5m gambling racket in US
description: A Gujarat-origin man residing in the US has pleaded guilty to a multimillion-dollar illegal gambling conspiracy in southwest Missouri. Tushar Patel admitted his role in a racket that generated nearly $9.5 million in illegal proceeds. He faces charges including conspiracy to commit wire fraud, operate an illegal gambling business, and money laundering.

title: Operation Sheruwali enters Day 7; searches continue in J&K’s Rajouri
description: Security forces are in the seventh day of a relentless hunt for two to three terrorists in Rajouri's dense forests. The joint operation, bolstered by helicopters, drones, and sniffer dogs, intensified with heavy firing and shelling. A terrorist hideout was also discovered and destroyed. Top officers are overseeing the critical anti-terror mission.

title: Pam Bondi says Ghislaine Maxwell should ‘die in prison’ amid Epstein files probe
Shubman Gill’s stunning century powers GT into IPL 2026 final against RCB
description: Gujarat Titans reached their third IPL final after defeating Rajasthan Royals. Shubman Gill scored a magnificent century to guide Gujarat in their chase. Rajasthan had posted a strong total thanks to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's brilliant knock. Gujarat's opening partnership was key to their success. They will now face Royal Challengers Bengaluru in the final.

title: From Ahinda to Mekedatu: 5 challenges before Karnataka's new CM
description: Karnataka's new Congress government, led by DK Shivakumar, faces a critical transition. Key challenges include cabinet formation balancing caste and regional demands, sustaining welfare guarantees amid fiscal strain, and navigating the sensitive Mekedatu reservoir dispute with Tamil Nadu. Shivakumar must also retain the crucial Ahinda support base and ensure development extends beyond Bengaluru to rural areas.

title: Sonakshi Sinha rents out Bandra luxury home to Kuwait Consulate for Rs 1.92 crore: Report
description: Sonakshi Sinha has leased out her upscale apartment in Mumbai’s Bandra West to the Consulate General of the State of Kuwait for a yearly rent of Rs 1.92 crore, property registration documents accessed by CRE Matrix revealed. The apartment has reportedly been rented for the residential use of Kuwait’s Consul General Emad Abdul Aziz Al-Kharaz along with his family members and staff. The agreement states that the monthly rent for the property is Rs 16 lakh. The lease period begins on June 7, 2026, and will continue till June 6, 2027.

title: CNG price hiked to Rs 86 per kg in Mumbai, piped gas to Rs 52 per unit
description: Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) prices have increased by Rs 2 per kg in the Mumbai Metropolitan Region, taking the new rate to Rs 86 per kg. Piped cooking gas will also see a 50 paise per unit hike. This rise is attributed to global energy supply chain disruptions and increased procurement costs.

title: Four lines that 'layoff email' from Meta Leadership has for those on H-1B visa
description: Meta has initiated another round of significant layoffs, impacting nearly 8,000 employees globally, with notifications starting in Singapore. While many are let go, over 7,000 will transition to AI initiatives. The company is providing immigration guidance and severance packages, including 16 weeks' pay plus two weeks per service year, and 18 months of COBRA coverage for affected staff.
